name: Fairway Polo — Sage
description: Our flagship polo, cut from a moisture-wicking piqué blend that moves with your swing. Clean collar, subtle tonal Sakaki embroidery at the chest, and a relaxed fit that works on and off the course.

name: Birdie Short — Oatmeal
description: A 7" inseam golf short with a structured waistband and four-way stretch fabric. Deep side pockets, a slim-straight cut, and tonal stitching throughout.

name: Grove Quarter-Zip — Charcoal
description: A mid-layer built for those early morning rounds. Brushed interior fleece, a clean exterior finish, and a minimal Sakaki wordmark at the left chest.

name: Links Cap — Bone
description: A low-profile structured cap with a curved brim and tonal Sakaki script embroidery. Adjustable strap back, one size fits most.

name: Caddie Polo — White
description: A relaxed-fit polo with a subtle dropped hem and clean collar. Soft stretch piqué with a refined drape that looks polished round after round.

name: Par Skort — Sand
description: A 15" skort with built-in shorts, side pockets, and a waistband with hidden drawstring. Lightweight stretch fabric with a clean, tailored finish.

name: Tee Time Crewneck — Sage
description: An elevated crewneck sweatshirt in a relaxed, slightly oversized fit. French terry interior, ribbed cuffs and hem, and tonal embroidery at the chest.

name: Greenside Belt — Tan
description: A full-grain leather belt with a clean gunmetal buckle and subtle Sakaki deboss. Cut to trim at home for a perfect fit.
